title: Windrush Compensation Scheme: equality impact assessment
body: "The EIA has been updated to reflect policy changes made to the scheme since March 2022:   awards for homelessness an additional living costs category for close family members claim suspension and initial assessment processes linking related claims the definition of parent for those applying as a close family member the definition of spouse for those applying as a close family member people who lost settled status in the UK after 2 years overseas updates to loss of access to employment category updates to the eligibility criteria regarding continuous residence state pension solution update to the case work process – single casework operations launch of the Windrush Compensation Advocacy Support Fund   "
